description_long: This bottle features a bulbous, patchwork body with a green and reddish-brown color scheme, resembling stitched-together fabric or leather. The neck is wrapped in red material and adorned with a set of small, bone-like decorations tied with string. At the top, the bottle is sealed with a cap shaped like a stylized bird skull, complete with eye sockets and a pronounced beak. The surface is matte and slightly textured, with visible seams and stitches adding to its handcrafted, rustic appearance. The bottle's design suggests a mystical or alchemical theme, making it stand out as a unique personal item. No visible branding or text is present, and the bottle appears opaque, concealing its contents.
description: A patchwork bottle with a green and reddish-brown stitched body, topped by a bird skull-shaped cap and bone-like decorations. The surface is matte and rustic, evoking a mystical or alchemical style.
description_view_0: Front view shows the bird skull cap, bone decorations, and the green and reddish-brown stitched body most clearly.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the elongated beak of the bird skull cap and the roundness of the bottle's body.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the back stitching and the full roundness of the bottle, with fewer visible decorations.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displays the stitched reddish-brown patch and the side profile of the bird skull cap.
